name: DUST II | The Infinite Zero Point

reviews.review_description: To be honest I thought it was gonna be a pretty bad game. But surprisingly it wasn't it's a pretty good sandbox game to play. The only problem I have with this game is that it is buggy but hopefully developers fixed this but overall I could play for hours with friends and not get bored!   Also I wish there is more to story because it sounds interesting

developer_response.body: Hello, babboey123! Thanks for taking the time out of your day and writing a review, it means a lot to us! And don’t worry we hope to fix all the major bugs and small bugs very soon. The story will also be continued soon and will finish this year! See you next time in reality ZERO.

reviews.review_description: Super fun game recomended for everyone i like it verymuch very entertaining and fun love for this game is 100%

developer_response.body: Hello, Explitsy! Thanks for reviewing our game.

reviews.review_description: absolutely peak game, i love it twin ❤️‍🩹
